subject: english
title: Unit 8 Grammar 2 — Direct + Indirect Objects
subtitle: v1 · Trophy Day at the Bernabéu spine · 42 slides · scope: give/show/send/tell/write (to) + buy/make (for) · LP activity-shape preserved, content soccer-overlaid · DO not REVEAL · embodied academic mini-games (direct object 🎁 / indirect object 👤)

content: Identify and use direct and indirect objects in a sentence.
Rewrite a Pattern A sentence (verb + D.O. + to/for + I.O.) as Pattern B (verb + I.O. + D.O.) — same meaning.
Choose the right preposition: to with give/show/send/tell/write; for with buy/make.
language: Use the WHAT? question to identify the direct object.
Use the TO/FOR WHOM? question to identify the indirect object.
Drop to and for in Pattern B (verb + I.O. + D.O. has no preposition).
Recycle Vocabulary 2 nouns (bug, comic book, dinosaur, fossil, stuffed animal) as direct objects.
